question: What is the actual all-in cost of selling on each major Chinese e-commerce platform?

findings.claim: Taobao/Tmall merchant total operating costs: 20-40%+ of revenue, with traffic/advertising being 10-30%+ of revenue (>50% of total operating costs)
findings.data: Taobao/Tmall cost breakdown: Store/tool fees <1%. Platform service fees 5-7% (0.6% base software fee + 2-5% Tmall commission + points fees). Traffic promotion 10-30%+ of revenue (over 50% of total operating costs). After-sales/logistics ~5%. Total: ~20-40%+ of revenue. Commission-to-traffic income ratio: approximately 1:2.4. One fashion brand founder reported return rates rose from 30-40% to 70-80% since 2021 while traffic costs increased tenfold.

findings.claim: Pinduoduo merchant costs can be as low as 5-7% for price-competitive merchants vs 12-27% on other platforms
findings.data: Pinduoduo's traffic distribution based on single-product low pricing -- merchants who offer lower prices get more traffic. SME merchants can redirect ~15% of marketing expenses into lower prices for algorithmic recommendations. With price advantage: combined commission + after-sales + traffic costs of 5-7%. Without: 12-27%. This is significantly lower than Taobao/Tmall's 20-40%.

findings.claim: JD.com overall take rate ~2.4% on GMV in 2023; 3P commission rates typically 2-8%, some POP merchants reduced to 0.6%
findings.data: JD 2023 GMV: US$485 billion. Take rate: 2.4% (low due to hybrid 1P/3P model -- 1P generates high revenue at thin margins). Standard 3P commission: 2-8% depending on category (can range 1-30%). POP merchants selected for low-price strategy program had commission reduced to 0.6%. 1P vs 3P split (2024): 1P 27%, 3P 73% of total GMV. JD.com also charges $15,000 refundable deposit and $1,000 annual platform fee for JD Worldwide sellers.

findings.claim: A lamp factory owner's example: promotion fees nearly consuming 70% of profits, needing 400-500 RMB daily (up from 100 RMB)
findings.data: A lamp factory owner reported spending 100 RMB/day on promotion previously, now needs 400-500 RMB daily. Over a recent 30-day period, promotion fees reached 11,400 RMB -- nearly consuming 70% of her profits. Multiple merchants report traffic promotion fees at 50%+ of cost structure, some reaching 70%.
